name: marketing agencies managing 5–15 clients/month tool
description: For marketing agencies processing 5–15 clients/month, inefficient tracking of lead activity causes missed revenue opportunities. We automate sales pipeline management instead of manual spreadsheets and email updates.
problem_solved: inefficient tracking of lead activity and revenue forecasting
